bardic inspiration: You can inspire others through stirring words or music. To do so, you use a bonus action on your turn to choose one creature other than yourself within 60 feet of you who can hear you. That creature gains one Bardic Inspiration die, a d6.
boots of swiftness: Enchanted boots given to me by Talon; allow me to teleport to a location I have previously been to that is no farther than 15 ft away, no cooldowns.
ring of invisibility: While wearing this ring, you can turn invisible as an action. Anything you are wearing or carrying is invisible with you. You remain invisible until the ring is removed, until you attack or cast a spell, or until you use a bonus action to become visible again.
